overall.description: First-person exploration of a grand wizarding common room with stone walls, tapestries, and Gothic windows. The player walks through the main hall with students in robes, ascends a grand wooden staircase, and explores an upper lounge with exposed beams overlooking the main floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room with tapestries and study areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room observing the tapestries, portraits, and antique furniture

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a wooden bench reading a book
student standing near the suit of armor looking at a painting

entered.detail: tall red and gold tapestry covering the stone wall between windows
full plate armor standing on display next to wooden cabinetry
large oval framed portrait of a bearded figure in ornate gold frame
tall arched windows with multiple panes letting in bright daylight
large stone fireplace with wooden mantel and decorative items
built-in wooden shelves filled with books and curiosities
antique celestial globe on a wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a spacious stone-walled common room illuminated by tall Gothic windows. The camera moves through the space, passing suits of armor, large tapestries, and students in dark robes sitting on benches. Warm sunlight streams across the red carpets and antique wooden furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand wooden staircase connecting main floor to upper level

events.description: approaches and begins ascending the grand curved wooden staircase
continues climbing the spiral staircase, turning with the curve

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral wooden staircase toward the upper floor

notable_agents.action: two students in dark robes conversing at the base of the staircase

entered.detail: wide curved staircase with dark wooden steps and ornate carved railings
polished wooden handrail with decorative newel posts
rough-hewn stone walls of the stairwell with small wall lanterns

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the main floor to a grand wooden staircase, ascending the curved steps with polished railings. Stone walls line the stairwell, and small lanterns provide warm light. Two students are visible at the base of the stairs as the camera climbs toward the upper landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with tall windows leading to upper lounge

events.description: passes through the wooden door with glass panels into the upper lounge area

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow stone corridor toward the upper room entrance

entered.detail: grey stone block walls with tall narrow windows
ornate iron wall sconce with glowing light
tall wooden door with decorative glass paneling and iron hinges

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow stone corridor with tall windows on the left side letting in daylight. The walls are grey stone blocks, and ornate wall lanterns provide additional lighting. The segment ends as the camera approaches and passes through a decorative wooden door with glass panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy upper lounge with exposed wooden beams and balcony overlook

events.description: approaches balcony railing and looks down at the main common room floor below

agents.ego_description: exploring the upper lounge, examining the furniture and looking down at the main room from the balcony

notable_agents.action: owl perched on a stone ledge turning its head and looking around

entered.detail: exposed dark wooden support beams crossing the angled ceiling
plush brown leather chairs arranged around a circular rug
wooden railing overlooking the main common room floor below
large wrought iron chandelier with multiple candle holders hanging from chains
tall vertical banners with red and gold heraldic designs hanging from walls

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a cozy upper lounge with exposed wooden ceiling beams and warm lighting. Leather armchairs sit on patterned rugs, and house banners hang on the stone walls. The camera approaches a balcony railing to look down at the main common room below, then pans to show an owl perched on a stone ledge near a globe stand.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the expansive, sunlit main hall of a wizarding common room up into a secluded, cozy upper lounge. It begins by gliding through the spacious stone room past suits of armor and students in dark robes, where warm sunlight illuminates red carpets and antique furniture. The camera then transitions from the main floor to a grand wooden staircase, ascending the curved steps and polished railings past flickering lanterns toward an upper landing. As the camera moves through a narrow stone corridor lined with tall windows and ornate lanterns, it passes through a decorative glass-paneled door to enter a lounge with exposed ceiling beams and leather armchairs. The scene finally reaches a balcony railing overlooking the main hall below before panning toward an owl perched on a stone ledge beside a globe stand.
